---
title: "SNP filtering for all samples of all species"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#This script is for SNP filtering, including all samples (i.e. D. concolor, triple plated Shortlands sample, Miat etc.)
```

##Load packages

```{r}
#| output: false
library(vcfR)
library(SNPfiltR)
library(StAMPP)
```

##Read in vcf

```{r}
#read vcf into this R session as vcfR 
vcfR <- read.vcfR("~/Desktop/Projects/Dicaeum/vcfs/populations.snps.vcf")

#create popmap
popmap<-data.frame(id=colnames(vcfR@gt)[2:length(colnames(vcfR@gt))],pop=substr(colnames(vcfR@gt)[2:length(colnames(vcfR@gt))], 3,11))
```

##Hard filter

```{r}
#visualize distributions
hard_filter(vcfR=vcfR)
```

##Genotype depth/quality

```{r}
#hard filter to minimum depth of 3, and minimum genotype quality of 30
vcfR<-hard_filter(vcfR=vcfR, depth = 3, gq = 30)
```

##Allele balance

```{r}
#execute allele balance filter
vcfR<-filter_allele_balance(vcfR, min.ratio = 0.2, max.ratio = 0.8)
```

##Max depth

```{r}
#visualize and pick appropriate max depth cutoff
max_depth(vcfR)

#set appropriate max depth cutoff
vcfR<-max_depth(vcfR,maxdepth = 200)
```

##Check vcfR for snps retained

```{r}
#check how many SNPs
vcfR
```

##Removing invariant SNPs

```{r}
vcfR<-min_mac(vcfR,min.mac = 1)
```

#Filter to biallelic SNPs only

```{r}
#vcfR<-filter_biallelic(vcfR)
```

##Missing data

```{r}
#run function to visualize per sample missingness
miss.vcfR<-missing_by_sample(vcfR)

#run function to drop samples above threshold
#vcfR.trim<-missing_by_sample(vcfR=vcfR.trim, cutoff = 0.5)

#remove samples above 0.5 (except for Miat)
vcfR.trim<-vcfR[,colnames(vcfR@gt) != "D_aen_32085a"]
vcfR.trim<-vcfR.trim[,colnames(vcfR.trim@gt) != "D_aen_32085c"]
vcfR.trim<-vcfR.trim[,colnames(vcfR.trim@gt) != "D_aen_34871"]
vcfR.trim<-vcfR.trim[,colnames(vcfR.trim@gt) != "D_aen_34852"]
vcfR.trim<-vcfR.trim[,colnames(vcfR.trim@gt) != "D_aen_34496"]
vcfR.trim<-vcfR.trim[,colnames(vcfR.trim@gt) != "D_tris_35052"]
vcfR.trim<-vcfR.trim[,colnames(vcfR.trim@gt) != "D_aen_32777"]
vcfR.trim<-vcfR.trim[,colnames(vcfR.trim@gt) != "D_hir_6156"]
```

##Investigate technical replicate

```{r}
#filter
vcfR.trim.100<-missing_by_snp(vcfR.trim,cutoff = 1)

#convert to genlight
gen<-vcfR2genlight(vcfR.trim.100)
#shorten names
gen@ind.names<-gsub("D_","",gen@ind.names)
#assign populations (a StaMPP requirement)
gen@pop<-as.factor(gen@ind.names)
#generate pairwise divergence matrix
sample.div <- stamppNeisD(gen, pop = FALSE)
#export for splitstree
stamppPhylip(distance.mat=sample.div, file="~/Desktop/solomon.dicaeum.v2/test.100.all.splits.txt")
```

![Technical replicate clustering](technical%20replicates%20grouping%20together.png)

Technical replicates cluster together

##Remove technical replicate

```{r}
#remove technical replicates
vcfR.trim<-vcfR.trim[,colnames(vcfR.trim@gt) != "D_exi_27657b"]
```

##Removing invariant SNPs

```{r}
vcfR.trim<-min_mac(vcfR.trim,min.mac = 1)
```

##Filter for missing data per SNP

```{r}
#View missingness per SNP
missingness<-missing_by_snp(vcfR=vcfR.trim)
#Filter for cutoff
vcfR.trim<-missing_by_snp(vcfR=vcfR.trim, cutoff = 1)
```

##Visualize depth and quality

```{r}
#plot depth per snp and per sample
dp <- extract.gt(vcfR.trim, element = "DP", as.numeric=TRUE)
heatmap.bp(dp, rlabels = FALSE)

#plot genotype quality per snp and per sample
gq <- extract.gt(vcfR.trim, element = "GQ", as.numeric=TRUE)
heatmap.bp(gq, rlabels = FALSE)
```

##Linkage filter

```{r}
#perform linkage filtering to get a reduced vcf with only unlinked SNPs
vcfR.thin<-distance_thin(vcfR.trim, min.distance = 1000)
```

##Write vcf for downstream analyses

```{r}
#get info for all SNPs passing filtering vcf dataset
vcfR.trim

#write to disk
#vcfR::write.vcf(vcfR.trim, file = "~/Desktop/Projects/Dicaeum/vcfs/filtered.miat.snps.vcf.gz")

#get info for the thinned SNP dataset
vcfR.thin

#write to disk
#vcfR::write.vcf(vcfR.thin, file = "~/Desktop/Projects/Dicaeum/vcfs/filtered.miat.unlinked.snps.vcf.gz")
```
